## Summary

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Change type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] New or revised design module
- [ ] Validation or script improvement
- [ ] Demonstration example
- [ ] Other

## Evidence and testing

Describe the corpus, command, or synthetic case used to test the change.

## Scientific integrity checklist

- [ ] Verified claims still require a PDF page and relocation phrase.
- [ ] Original values and units are preserved.
- [ ] Study units and repeated observations are not conflated.
- [ ] Design-specific limitations are documented.
- [ ] No restricted PDFs, personal data, secrets, or credentials are included.
- [ ] Documentation and examples are updated where needed.
